query: /api-designer design User management API with RBAC, OAuth2 authentication, supporting create, read, update, delete operations on users and roles
expected_behavior: Agent activates api-designer skill in Design mode
Agent detects REST protocol from requirements (CRUD operations, resource-based)
Agent loads references/rest-conventions.md for REST best practices
Agent parses requirements to extract resources (users, roles), operations (CRUD), and auth (OAuth2)
Agent designs endpoints following REST conventions: /users, /users/{id}, /roles, /roles/{id}
Agent defines request/response schemas with proper types and validation
Agent includes error responses (400, 401, 403, 404, 422) on all endpoints
Agent runs api-spec-validator.py on the generated spec
